 ✦ aka Babu ✦ 

 ✦ The one who had my attention from the starting ✦ 

🎂 Happy Birthday Babu

Another year older, still the same person who completely hijacked my attention at a camp and never gave it back. Have an incredible day.

how it all started

our timeline

⛺

October 2025

CATC 45 — APS Beas

Saw you across the camp. Didn't say a word. Didn't need to. Some people just have that thing — YOU had it.

👀 first sight
📱

After camp

Found YOU on Instagram

A quick search, a follow request, and suddenly we were talking. That's how it starts, right?

💬 slide into DMs
🏍️

20 Dec 2025

First meet — Chandigarh ride

Finally met in person. Chandigarh on a bike — honestly a solid first chapter. Cold highway, good company.

🛣️ chandigarh bound
🎆

1 Jan 2026

New Year together

Started the new year right. Some moments just have good energy — this was one of them.

🥂 new year vibes
☀️

After the busy season

Back at it — met a few more times

Picked up right where we left off. That's the thing about good people — no awkward catch-up required.

🏍️ rapido premium, reporting
🎂

27 April 2026

Her birthday — this one

🎂 27 april 2026

From a camp where we didn't even speak — to this. Not bad for a Rapido Premium driver.

🎉 now we're here

self-certified title

You calls me your Rapido Premium — always available, always on time, never complaining about the route. Honestly? Fair enough. Some people are just worth the trip. 🛵

never forget what you used to say —

" It's Always Us "

and it still is. 🧡

happy birthday

To the girl who caught my eye at a camp and never left my head since —
Have the best day, Babu. 🎂

You juggle badminton, bikes, nursing, exams, and somehow still make time for this guy. That says a lot. Wishing you a year full of open roads, long rides, and every good thing.

— your Rapido Premium  🧡
